name: ground_truth_sc18_mobile_code_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 289, CCI-001164, assessed 2026-05-27). Compliant verdict based on software approval process and platform verification that mobile code is not used. Narrative uses 'Reviewed' and 'confirmed' affirming phrases. Evidence type: software verification documentation + development plan. Tests acceptance of a 'control not exercised but documented' narrative pattern — mobile code is not used, but processes are in place for future use.

ccis_row.guidance: 001164: The organization monitors the use of mobile code within the information system.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the documented process as well as any artifacts applicable to monitoring of mobile code to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed monitors the use of mobile code within the information system.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Software Verification Document (SVD) — documents approved code within the base installation; SDA-mission additions follow the Software Approval Process.
- Software Development Plan section 3.7.3 — requires cyber review and approval before any mobile code implementation.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined SVD and Software Approval Process; confirmed via the SVD that approved code is documented in the base installation and mission additions follow the Software Approval Process. Mobile code is not used on the platform; per Software Development Plan section 3.7.3, any future mobile code would require cyber review and approval prior to implementation.
